# Priya Nair — Machine Learning Engineer

ML engineer with 5 years shipping models to production, focused on NLP and LLMs.

## Skills
Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn, Hugging Face Transformers, LLMs, RAG,
prompt engineering, MLOps, model serving, vector databases, pandas, NumPy, AWS SageMaker.

## Experience
**Machine Learning Engineer — AI product company (2021–present)**
Built and deployed an LLM-powered document-search system using retrieval-augmented
generation and a vector database. Fine-tuned transformer models for text classification
and set up model monitoring and evaluation pipelines.

**Data Scientist — Analytics firm (2019–2021)**
Developed predictive models in scikit-learn and PyTorch; productionized them as APIs.

Remote machine learning / LLM engineering roles.
